title: Cedarwood Moth Repellent for Wardrobes, 28 Pcs 100% Natural Cedar Wood Discs, Cedar Wood Rings & Cedar Moth Balls for Storage Box, Drawers, Wardrobe Storage & Clothes, Ideal Moth Killer & Freshener
features: Complete Pack for Full Coverage: With 28 pieces in total (10 cedar balls, 10 cubes, 6 rings, and 2 hangers) besto gives you everything you need for whole-home freshness; Use them in multiple rooms or share them between family members’ closets

100% Natural and Chemical-Free: Many cedarwood moth repellents are made with strong chemicals that can irritate the skin or leave unpleasant odours on clothes; Besto cedarwood is made from pure cedar that works effectively without compromising your health or the environment

Natural Protection Against Moths: Clothes moths silently ruin your favourite outfits by eating away at natural fibres; The fresh cedar scent creates an environment that moths avoid, keeping your clothes protected while leaving your wardrobe smelling clean and fresh

Safe for Families & Pets: Besto cedarwood pack is made from pure, natural wood with no added chemicals, so it’s safe to use around your family and pets; Unlike mothballs, it won’t release strong odours or harmful fumes

Long-Lasting Freshness You Can Renew: Unlike sprays or sachets that quickly fade, cedarwood continues working for months; And when the scent starts to weaken, a light sanding (every 2-3 months) on the surface renews its effectiveness

Flexible Usage for Every Space: Use 4-8 pieces in drawers, 1-24 in wardrobes, 4-12 in sports bags, and 12-24 in clothes bags for maximum effectiveness; This flexibility results in the right amount of protection and freshness, no matter where you store your clothes
